# Support

Use public Issues only for reproducible bugs, documentation defects, and approved feature proposals. Search existing Issues first and remove all credentials, private data, internal URLs, and sensitive logs.

For usage questions, start with the repository README and published documentation. Approved community discussion channels and paid/commercial support status are `TBD`; do not infer that a response-time commitment exists.

Security reports belong in the private route described by [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md), not public Issues or Discussions.
